memories: User prefers watching movies at the small independent theater downtown rather than large multiplexes.
User runs three miles through the neighborhood park every morning, using the time to brainstorm ideas for creative projects.
The user's friend Michael is a vegetarian.
The user works as a journalist for a local newspaper.
The user owns a golden retriever named Buddy.
The user prefers simple recipes with fewer than 10 ingredients.
The user's friend Jessica has a severe gluten allergy.
The user wants to cook on their new outdoor grill.
The user is hosting a dinner party for their friends Michael and Jessica.
query: I'm having Michael and Jessica over for a dinner party. What's a simple meal I can make for everyone on my new grill?
